flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Brown University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($62.3k → $71.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Brown University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($62.3k → $71.4k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Brown University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (86.5% → 77.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Brown University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).
